title: BEM-833 restore dispatcher
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='
'
for d in ['.github/workflows','scripts','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport','governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:52 (UTC+3)'
state_script=Path('scripts/record_claude_dispatcher_state.py')
state_script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3
import json
import sys
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
from pathlib import Path
SEP="\n"
KYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))
mode=sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else "unknown"
outcome=sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else mode
now=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")
state_path=Path("governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json")
try:
    data=json.loads(state_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")) if state_path.exists() else {}
except Exception:
    data={}
runs=data.get("runs",[]) if isinstance(data.get("runs",[]),list) else []
runs.append({"time":now,"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome})
data.update({"schema_version":"claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.v1","status":"runtime_"+mode,"latest":{"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome,"time":now},"started_at":data.get("started_at") or now,"completed_at":now if mode=="complete" else data.get("completed_at"),"claude_action_outcome":outcome if mode=="complete" else data.get("claude_action_outcome"),"runs":runs[-200:],"operator_role":"none"})
state_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")
print(json.dumps({"status":data["status"],"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome,"time":now},ensure_ascii=False))
''')
commit_script=Path('scripts/commit_claude_dispatcher_state.sh')
commit_script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
git add -A governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt governance/reports || true
git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No Claude dispatcher changes" || git commit -m "BEM-833 Claude dispatcher state/mailbox"
git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
git push || true
''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Internal Auditor Dispatcher

on:
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write
  pull-requests: read
  issues: read

concurrency:
  group: claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-internal-auditor:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Record dispatcher start
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_dispatcher_state.py start dispatcher_started
      - name: Claude internal auditor responds to mailbox
        id: claude
        continue-on-error: true
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
          ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
        with:
          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          prompt: |
            You are Claude Internal Auditor for repository bereznyi-aleksandr/ai-devops-system.
            Read the newest request in governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/.
            Write a real response file to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem833_claude_response.md.
            The response must start with: CLAUDE RESPONSE.
            Include DECISION: APPROVED, CHANGE_REQUIRED, or BLOCKED.
            Explain why prior response was missing if you can infer it.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
      - name: Record dispatcher complete
        if: always()
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_dispatcher_state.py complete ${{ steps.claude.outcome }}
      - name: Commit dispatcher state and mailbox
        if: always()
        run: bash scripts/commit_claude_dispatcher_state.sh
''')
q=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem833_claude_dispatch_after_workflow_restore.json')
q.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
q.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v5','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-833 dispatch after restoring missing Claude dispatcher workflow','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
checks=[
 {'name':'workflow_created','pass':wf.exists(),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'state_script_created','pass':state_script.exists(),'evidence':str(state_script)},
 {'name':'commit_script_created','pass':commit_script.exists(),'evidence':str(commit_script)},
 {'name':'queue_item_created','pass':q.exists(),'evidence':str(q)}]
status='claude_dispatcher_workflow_restored' if all(c['pass'] for c in checks) else 'restore_failed'
state={'bem':'BEM-833','status':status,'checks':checks,'queue_file':str(q),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem833_restore_claude_dispatcher_workflow.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem833_restore_claude_dispatcher_workflow.md').write_text('# BEM-833 | Restore Claude Dispatcher Workflow | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem833_next.md').write_text('Next: fresh Codex tick to process queue and then verify dispatch result, runtime state, and real Claude response. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-833'+sep+sep+'Claude dispatcher workflow restored. Next: tick and verify smoke triad.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed_files.extend([str(state_script),str(commit_script),str(wf),str(q),'governance/state/bem833_restore_claude_dispatcher_workflow.json','governance/reports/bem833_restore_claude_dispatcher_workflow.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem833_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl'])
ops_applied.append('Restored missing Claude internal auditor dispatcher workflow, state writer, commit script, and queued a fresh dispatch')
"""
